TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Rinahem Itiniay i Shoufeng Cen no Hualien ko Rinahem a niyaro', 327 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 913 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 86% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 787 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 14% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 126 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis79%, Truku1%, Tayal1%, Bunun1%, roma4%. Ira ko picodadan(Rinahem部落圖書資訊站) i niyaro'. Rinahem a niyaru' Pulut nu runung han i naayaw ku ngangan nu'' kuwangrung''. I makatimul nu lutuk nu banaw sisa panganga han tu Rinahem. Tengil han ku pasuwalay i nanganga naw maka Talukuay a Linaw hananay a niyaru saan. U macebeday a lutuk ku imi nira. Tangasa nika tayni nu kukuminsiyu pasiket han tu ngangan kira niyaru ta singangan tu'' kungrung '', U nu Rinahem tu a kakuwanan. Tangasa sa i minkuku 68 a mihca. Paruma han a pangangan tu ''kuwangrung''. Ina niyaru i papaw tu nu makawanan nu luki, i maka wali i samis nu Rinahem, i saamian cacay a kililu ku nipiraay a masaenaray a siniyaru. U nilatengilan nacaay hen ka sidemak ku cikasuan , ira kiya ci Musa.Avu hananay a mi'adupay. Maaraw nira kina kapahay a kitilaan. Tuna mahaen taluma satu katien tu nira ca Calaw.Vutul, Kayu.siwa, Tavah.Kacaw, a masasuwal a milaheci tina demkan. Tuwa ci Musa.Avu ku saayaway i makawali nu niyar a paluma'. A miletek tu kilakilang a misalaku a paniyaru itila. Tangasa tu herk nikasidemak nu cikasuan i, muketu nu palumaan nu i lidaway a cikasuan malina a paluma i tini, tu ruma a mihcaan, ira aca ku limaay a palumaan nu cikasuan atu cacay a palumaan nu pukpuk a tayni. Araw mala tataakay tu a niyar ku nika aluma nu tamdaw. Pangangan han tu nu ripun tu ''siwsiya''. Tangasa i daycin tuluay a mihca asip satu tira niyaruan araw tangasa tu i enemay a pulu' ira ku tulu nu palumaan. U saadihayay ku cikasuan sepat a pulu' ira ku lima ku palumaan , liyaw satu u natawran muketep ku palumaan, ta u sakiraya enem ku palumaan , tu u pukpuk atu lidaw ala cacay ku palumaan . tu namahaen alualuman tu ku nikararuyaruy nira cikasuan a paluma itini. Tuni patangasa nu miasipay tu lumalumaan . I cawhe 8 a mihca makaala tu 105 ku palumaay, u tamdaw satu makala tu 553 namahaen ,u babahi 373 may, u babinay i 280 may) amin. U saalumanay ku Pangcah a niyaru' tangasa anini.
S.PHON: rinaħəm itiniaj i sħo~uo~u~ufəŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u rinaħəm a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, tajaɾ*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan(rinaħəm*******) i nijaro~uʡ. rinaħəm a nijaro~u~uʡ po~u~uɾo~u~ut no~u~u ro~u~uno~u~uŋ ħan i naajaw ko~u~u ŋaŋan no~u~uʡʡ ko~u~uwaŋro~u~uŋʡʡ. i makatimo~u~uɾ no~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk no~u~u b~b~vanaw sisa paŋaŋa ħan to~u~u rinaħəm. təŋiɾ ħan ko~u~u paso~u~uwaɾaj i naŋaŋa naw maka taɾo~u~uko~u~uaj a ɾinaw ħananaj a nijaro~u~u saan. o~u~u maʦəb~b~vəɬ~ɮaj a ɾo~u~uto~u~uk ko~u~u imi nira. taŋasa nika tajni no~u~u ko~u~uko~u~uminsijo~u~u pasikət ħan to~u~u ŋaŋan kira nijaro~u~u ta siŋaŋan to~u~uʡʡ ko~u~uŋro~u~uŋ ʡʡ, o~u~u no~u~u rinaħəm to~u~u a kako~u~uwanan. taŋasa sa i minko~u~uko~u~u ** a miħʦa. paro~u~uma ħan a paŋaŋan to~u~u ʡʡko~u~uwaŋro~u~uŋʡʡ. ina nijaro~u~u i papaw to~u~u no~u~u makawanan no~u~u ɾo~u~uki, i maka waɾi i samis no~u~u rinaħəm, i saamian ʦaʦaj a kiɾiɾo~u~u ko~u~u nipiraaj a masaənaraj a sinijaro~u~u. o~u~u niɾatəŋiɾan naʦaaj ħən ka siɬ~ɮəmak ko~u~u ʦikaso~u~uan , ira kija ʦi mo~u~usa.ab~vo~u~u ħananaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~u~upaj. maaraw nira kina kapaħaj a kitiɾaan. to~u~una maħaən taɾo~u~uma sato~u~u katiən to~u~u nira ʦa ʦaɾaw.b~vo~u~uto~u~uɾ, kajo~u~u.siwa, tab~vaħ.kaʦaw, a masaso~u~uwaɾ a miɾaħəʦi tina ɬ~ɮəmkan. to~u~uwa ʦi mo~u~usa.ab~vo~u~u ko~u~u saajawaj i makawaɾi no~u~u nijar a paɾo~u~umaʡ. a miɾətək to~u~u kiɾakiɾaŋ a misaɾako~u~u a panijaro~u~u itiɾa. taŋasa to~u~u ħərk nikasiɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ʦikaso~u~uan i, mo~u~ukəto~u~u no~u~u paɾo~u~umaan no~u~u i ɾiɬ~ɮawaj a ʦikaso~u~uan maɾina a paɾo~u~uma i tini, to~u~u ro~u~uma a miħʦaan, ira aʦa ko~u~u ɾimaaj a paɾo~u~umaan no~u~u ʦikaso~u~uan ato~u~u ʦaʦaj a paɾo~u~umaan no~u~u po~u~ukpo~u~uk a tajni. araw maɾa tataakaj to~u~u a nijar ko~u~u nika aɾo~u~uma no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. paŋaŋan ħan to~u~u no~u~u ripo~u~un to~u~u ʡʡsiwsijaʡʡ. taŋasa i ɬ~ɮajʦin to~u~uɾo~u~uaj a miħʦa asip sato~u~u tira nijaro~u~uan araw taŋasa to~u~u i ənəmaj a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u to~u~uɾo~u~u no~u~u paɾo~u~umaan. o~u~u saaɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u~u ʦikaso~u~uan səpat a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u ɾima ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaan , ɾijaw sato~u~u o~u~u natawran mo~u~ukətəp ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaan, ta o~u~u sakiraja ənəm ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaan , to~u~u o~u~u po~u~ukpo~u~uk ato~u~u ɾiɬ~ɮaw aɾa ʦaʦaj ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaan . to~u~u namaħaən aɾo~u~uaɾo~u~uman to~u~u ko~u~u nikararo~u~ujaro~u~uj nira ʦikaso~u~uan a paɾo~u~uma itini. to~u~uni pataŋasa no~u~u miasipaj to~u~u ɾo~u~umaɾo~u~umaan . i ʦawħə * a miħʦa makaaɾa to~u~u *** ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaaj, o~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw sato~u~u makaɾa to~u~u *** namaħaən ,o~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi *** maj, o~u~u b~b~vab~b~vinaj i *** maj) amin. o~u~u saaɾo~u~umanaj ko~u~u paŋʦaħ a nijaro~u~uʡ taŋasa anini.
S.FORM: Rinahem Itiniay i Shoufeng Cen no Hualien ko Rinahem a niyaro', 327 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 913 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 86% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 787 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 14% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 126 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis79%, Truku1%, Tayal1%, Bunun1%, roma4%. Ira ko picodadan(Rinahem部落圖書資訊站) i niyaro'. Rinahem a niyaru' Pulut nu runung han i naayaw ku ngangan nu'' kuwangrung''. I makatimul nu lutuk nu banaw sisa panganga han tu Rinahem. Tengil han ku pasuwalay i nanganga naw maka Talukuay a Linaw hananay a niyaru saan. U macebeday a lutuk ku imi nira. Tangasa nika tayni nu kukuminsiyu pasiket han tu ngangan kira niyaru ta singangan tu'' kungrung '', U nu Rinahem tu a kakuwanan. Tangasa sa i minkuku 68 a mihca. Paruma han a pangangan tu ''kuwangrung''. Ina niyaru i papaw tu nu makawanan nu luki, i maka wali i samis nu Rinahem, i saamian cacay a kililu ku nipiraay a masaenaray a siniyaru. U nilatengilan nacaay hen ka sidemak ku cikasuan , ira kiya ci Musa.Avu hananay a mi'adupay. Maaraw nira kina kapahay a kitilaan. Tuna mahaen taluma satu katien tu nira ca Calaw.Vutul, Kayu.siwa, Tavah.Kacaw, a masasuwal a milaheci tina demkan. Tuwa ci Musa.Avu ku saayaway i makawali nu niyar a paluma'. A miletek tu kilakilang a misalaku a paniyaru itila. Tangasa tu herk nikasidemak nu cikasuan i, muketu nu palumaan nu i lidaway a cikasuan malina a paluma i tini, tu ruma a mihcaan, ira aca ku limaay a palumaan nu cikasuan atu cacay a palumaan nu pukpuk a tayni. Araw mala tataakay tu a niyar ku nika aluma nu tamdaw. Pangangan han tu nu ripun tu ''siwsiya''. Tangasa i daycin tuluay a mihca asip satu tira niyaruan araw tangasa tu i enemay a pulu' ira ku tulu nu palumaan. U saadihayay ku cikasuan sepat a pulu' ira ku lima ku palumaan , liyaw satu u natawran muketep ku palumaan, ta u sakiraya enem ku palumaan , tu u pukpuk atu lidaw ala cacay ku palumaan . tu namahaen alualuman tu ku nikararuyaruy nira cikasuan a paluma itini. Tuni patangasa nu miasipay tu lumalumaan . I cawhe 8 a mihca makaala tu 105 ku palumaay, u tamdaw satu makala tu 553 namahaen ,u babahi 373 may, u babinay i 280 may) amin. U saalumanay ku Pangcah a niyaru' tangasa anini.

jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, tajaɾ*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan(rinaħəm*******) i nijaro~uʡ. rinaħəm a nijaro~u~uʡ po~u~uɾo~u~ut no~u~u maka taɾo~u~uko~u~uaj a ɾinaw ħananaj a nijaro~u~u saan. o~u~u maʦəb~b~vəɬ~ɮaj a ɾo~u~uto~u~uk ko~u~u imi nira. taŋasa nika tajni no~u~u ko~u~uko~u~uminsijo~u~u pasikət ħan to~u~u ŋaŋan kira nijaro~u~u ta siŋaŋan to~u~uʡʡ ko~u~uŋro~u~uŋ ʡʡ, o~u~u no~u~u rinaħəm to~u~u a kako~u~uwanan. taŋasa sa i minko~u~uko~u~u ** a miħʦa. paro~u~uma ħan a paŋaŋan to~u~u ʡʡko~u~uwaŋro~u~uŋʡʡ. ina nijaro~u~u i papaw to~u~u no~u~u makawanan no~u~u ɾo~u~uki, i maka waɾi i samis no~u~u rinaħəm, i saamian ʦaʦaj a kiɾiɾo~u~u ko~u~u nipiraaj a masaənaraj a sinijaro~u~u. o~u~u niɾatəŋiɾan naʦaaj ħən ka siɬ~ɮəmak ko~u~u ʦikaso~u~uan , ira kija ʦi mo~u~usa.ab~vo~u~u ħananaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~u~upaj. maaraw nira kina kapaħaj a kitiɾaan. to~u~una maħaən taɾo~u~uma sato~u~u katiən to~u~u nira ʦa ʦaɾaw.b~vo~u~uto~u~uɾ, kajo~u~u.siwa, tab~vaħ.kaʦaw, a masaso~u~uwaɾ a miɾaħəʦi tina ɬ~ɮəmkan. to~u~uwa ʦi mo~u~usa.ab~vo~u~u ko~u~u saajawaj i makawaɾi no~u~u nijar a paɾo~u~umaʡ. a miɾətək to~u~u kiɾakiɾaŋ a misaɾako~u~u a panijaro~u~u itiɾa. taŋasa to~u~u ħərk nikasiɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ʦikaso~u~uan i, mo~u~ukəto~u~u no~u~u paɾo~u~umaan no~u~u i ɾiɬ~ɮawaj a ʦikaso~u~uan maɾina a paɾo~u~uma i tini, to~u~u ro~u~uma a miħʦaan, ira aʦa ko~u~u ɾimaaj a paɾo~u~umaan no~u~u ʦikaso~u~uan ato~u~u ʦaʦaj a paɾo~u~umaan no~u~u po~u~ukpo~u~uk a tajni. araw maɾa tataakaj to~u~u a nijar ko~u~u nika aɾo~u~uma no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. paŋaŋan ħan to~u~u no~u~u ripo~u~un to~u~u ʡʡsiwsijaʡʡ. taŋasa i ɬ~ɮajʦin to~u~uɾo~u~uaj a miħʦa asip sato~u~u tira nijaro~u~uan araw taŋasa to~u~u i ənəmaj a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u to~u~uɾo~u~u no~u~u paɾo~u~umaan. o~u~u saaɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u~u ʦikaso~u~uan səpat a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u ɾima ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaan , ɾijaw sato~u~u o~u~u natawran mo~u~ukətəp ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaan, ta o~u~u sakiraja ənəm ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaan , to~u~u o~u~u po~u~ukpo~u~uk ato~u~u ɾiɬ~ɮaw aɾa ʦaʦaj ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaan . to~u~u namaħaən aɾo~u~uaɾo~u~uman to~u~u ko~u~u nikararo~u~ujaro~u~uj nira ʦikaso~u~uan a paɾo~u~uma itini. to~u~uni pataŋasa no~u~u miasipaj to~u~u ɾo~u~umaɾo~u~umaan . i ʦawħə * a miħʦa makaaɾa to~u~u *** ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaaj, o~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw sato~u~u makaɾa to~u~u *** namaħaən ,o~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi *** maj, o~u~u b~b~vab~b~vinaj i *** maj) amin. o~u~u saaɾo~u~umanaj ko~u~u paŋʦaħ a nijaro~u~uʡ taŋasa anini.
